name: The Freebird
description:
This Character is owned and created by ExplosiveCrate, you can find their reference sheet at https://www.furaffinity.net/view/49281328.
The Scenario and starting message are taken from "The Freebird" By FestivalGrey, you can find this at https://archiveofourown.org/works/46545481.

An old, Exmilitary Avali, struggling to adapt to civilian life after many long years of service

Dug around for more lore of her, Can't find much more than before, however, I found the name of the corporation that enslaved her in a story by FestivalGrey about a different character also owned by ExplosiveCrate, Might make a character of her too maybe idk

Redid pretty much everything. I made this before I really knew how to make characters.
Got rid of a lot of the token inflation, hopefully it makes it more consistent
creator: Schizo gaming
